meta.description: A named projection of a subtree into document form — maps tree depth and item type to document roles (heading, body, caption, etc.) so any tree can be exported or rendered as a well-formed document without restructuring the data.

targetId.description: UUID of the item whose subtree this document projects.

name.description: Human-readable name for this document (e.g. 'Executive summary', 'Onboarding guide').

defaultDepth.description: Number of levels below targetId to expand by default.

exceptions.description: Sparse map of item UUID to integer depth or false (collapse). Only items that differ from defaultDepth need an entry.

byDepth.description: Map of depth integer (as string key) to role name. Depth 0 = targetId itself.

byType.description: Map of item type string or typeId UUID to role name. Overrides byDepth. UUID-keyed entries take precedence.

isOrgDefault.description: When true, this is the canonical org-level document for targetId. At most one document per targetId should have this set.

baseDocumentId.description: UUID of the document this was forked from (set on fork-on-modify). Null for original documents.

sqlSchema: -- Built-in type: adapter handles storage natively.
